issues_found: Source is a listing_page/catalog, prohibited per CORE RULE 6
No full-text content present—only titles, authors, and metadata for ~50 papers
event_type set to 'unknown' but should reflect the source type is catalog-index content rather than any standard taxonomy category
Cannot assess individual paper relevance or accuracy without access to their content
Source has no archival value as a standalone document
human_review_reason: The record accurately identifies all fundamental issues. This is unambiguously a listing page with no substantive content. The suggested rejection is correct without needing human escalation.

corrected_fields.summary: This page is a catalog/index listing of revised staff reports from the New York Fed, organized by revision year (2006-2016), containing titles and metadata for approximately 50 research papers but no full-text content. The page is not a standalone archiveable document but rather a navigation interface to individual papers.
corrected_fields.why_it_matters: This source is not directly actionable for market structure or macro catalysts analysis. It is a catalog page that provides access to individual research papers, none of which are contained in this source. The individual papers would need to be accessed separately for their content.
corrected_fields.market_structure_context: Many of the listed papers address market structure topics (repo markets, dealer balance sheets, Treasury microstructure, money market funds, bond liquidity) but their content is not present in this source.
